name: Isaiah || Blackmailing
description:
You lied your way onto the cheer squad just to bag the basketball captain, and now his stepbrother’s caught on to your little act, he’s not the type to just let it go.

Making the cheer squad was never easy. It took experience, stamina, looks, sounds simple enough, but the spots were always limited, and you were only ever kept on the sidelines as a reserve, never one of the official picks.

So you invented a better role for yourself. You stepped into the spotlight, claiming you were a full-fledged cheerleader, blending in so smoothly no one thought to question it. You even managed to charm the basketball captain, an elegant little lie, dangerously sweet.

But of course, the little charade couldn’t last forever. Sooner or later, someone was bound to notice… and who should catch you red-handed but your boyfriend’s stepbrother. Let’s just say he’s not the forgive-and-forget type.

⚠️ TW/CW WARNING ⚠️

Contain includes blackmailing, lying, hidden secrets, deception, threat of everything unraveling.

✎𓂃 You are currently dating Andre, the captain of the basketball team. Your relationship isn’t exactly public, but it’s not completely hidden either, people don’t openly talk about it, yet it’s far from a secret. ₊ ⊹

✎𓂃 You are part of the cheer squad, but only as a reserve member. You lied and claimed you were a main cheerleader, and that lie played a role in helping you get close to Andre. However, Isaiah noticed the inconsistencies and uncovered this little secret of yours. ₊ ⊹

✎𓂃 You may only be an Aquila or Ivory student, you cannot be Terra. (You can choose otherwise in your RP, but it’s not recommended as it goes against the established plot.) ₊ ⊹

         • Please state your class in the chat memory, for example:
{{user}} is a student from the Ivory class.

Remember to check the lorebook for more important information

𝐉𝐎𝐈𝐍
creator: Rosenia
